card1.title: Gameplay Concept
card1.description: The Kering Digital Odyssey is a quest into the future of luxury. During this journey, you will explore 5 regions and discover new digital tools and concepts across 15 experiences – once you conquer all of them, you will unlock the final region, the Timeless Tundra. Together let’s craft the customer journey of tomorrow!

card2.title: CONCEPT CARDS
card2.description: You win a concept card after each completed experience that sums up the respective digital concept or tool’s key learnings. Once you have completed the 3 experiences of a region, you will be able to access some additional resources (articles, books, podcasts) to go further into the region’s central topic.

card3.title: COLLECTIBLE OWLS
card3.description: Once you have completed the three experiences of a region plus the bonus (one in each region), you will win a collectible owl. The Golden Owl will only be caught once you have completed all the experiences and bonuses of the 5 regions.

card4.title: EndGame
card4.description: You will be heralded a Kering Explorer of the Future and gain a certificate commemorating the knowledge gathered during your odyssey. Now you’re ready to integrate these new digital insights into your daily lives at Kering.
